items.example: There's a supermarket near my house.
The neighbours in our street are very friendly.
I get on well with the people next door.
We keep ourselves to ourselves, so we don't know many neighbours.
The dog barking all night gets on my nerves.
There's a real sense of community in this village.

items.phrase: I'd like to get to know…
items.example: I'd like to get to know my neighbours better.
